title: lathyrus cyaneus subsp. pinnatus
intro: Lathyrus cyaneus subsp. pinnatus, also known as the blue lathyrus, is a perennial plant in the pea family Fabaceae, native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic, diuretic, and expectorant effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting the nervous system. The blue lathyrus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
